Dubai Chambers explores ways to strengthen the resilience of bilateral trade flows with the Sultanate of Oman during a visit today by a delegation led by H.E. Mohammad Ali Rashed Lootah, President and CEO of Dubai Chambers, to Sohar in Oman’s Al Batinah North Governorate. During the visit, the delegation held a meeting with the Oman Chamber of Commerce and Industry branch in North Al Batinah Governorate, where discussions focused on enhancing bilateral cooperation mechanisms across priority sectors. The delegation also visited SOHAR Port and Freezone, as well as Sohar Industrial City (Madayn). Discussions during the visit focused on facilitating the smooth flow of goods and merchandise, enhancing the resilience of bilateral supply chains, and strengthening logistics integration between Dubai and Sohar, in support of mutual objectives.

🎯STRUCK: The largest petrochemical complex in Iran, responsible for producing and exporting chemical materials for the manufacturing of explosives.

With this strike, the IDF has now targeted Iran’s 2 biggest petrochemical complexes, rendering more than 85% of Iran’s petrochemical export capacity inoperable.

The damage to this infrastructure will disrupt the regime’s ability to produce essential components for the missile industry intended to target Israel and other countries in the Middle East.

🎯STRUCK: Numerous aerial assets, including aircraft and helicopters, as well as additional military infrastructure at 3 airports across Tehran—the Bahram, Mehrabad & Azmayesh Airports. 

Mehrabad Airport was used by the IRGC’s Quds Force and served as a central hub for arming and financing the regime’s terrorist proxies in the Middle East.

RT by @moiuae: UAE Air Defenses engaged 12 Ballistic Missiles and 2 Cruise Missiles and 19 UAV's.

The Ministry of Defense announced that on April 6, 2026, UAE air defense engaged 12 ballistic missiles, 2 cruise missiles, and 19 UAV's launched from Iran.

Since the onset of the blatant Iranian attacks, UAE air defenses have engaged a total of 519 ballistic missiles, 26 cruise missiles, and 2,210 UAV's.

These attacks resulted in injuries to 4 individuals, with injuries ranging from minor to moderate and severe. The total number of injuries has reached 221, involving individuals of various nationalities, including Emirati, Egyptian, Sudanese, Ethiopian, Filipino, Pakistani, Iranian, Indian, Bangladeshi, Sri Lankan, Azerbaijani, Yemeni, Ugandan, Eritrean, Lebanese, Afghan, Bahraini, Comorian, Turkish, Iraqi, Nepalese, Nigerian, Omani, Jordanian, Palestinian, Ghanaian, Indonesian, Swedish, Tunisian, Moroccan, and Russian.

No martyrs or fatalities have been reported in the past hours. Since the onset of the blatant Iranian attacks, the total number of martyrs has reached 2, in addition to the martyrdom of a Moroccan civilian contracted with the Armed Forces. The total number of civilian fatalities stands at 10 from Pakistani, Nepalese, Bangladeshi, Palestinian, Indian, and Egyptian nationalities.

The Ministry of Defence affirmed that it remains fully prepared and ready to deal with any threats and will firmly confront anything that aims to undermine the security of the country, in a manner that ensures the protection of its sovereignty, security and stability and safeguards its interests and national capabilities.

#وزارة_الدفاع 
#وزارة_الدفاع_الإماراتية
#MOD
#UAEMinistryOfDefence

R to @Mdais: Further update: Following last night’s incident in Haifa:

As of 12:40, a woman approximately 35 years old was rescued without signs of life. MDA paramedics pronounced her dead.

In summary, all four missing persons have been rescued, and pronounced dead.

Further update: Following last night’s incident in Haifa: As of 12:40, a woman approximately 35 years old was rescued without signs of life. MDA paramedics pronounced her dead. In summary, all four missing persons have been rescued, and pronounced dead.

R to @Mdais: Update: As of 12:20, a man in his 40s has been rescued without signs of life. MDA paramedics have pronounced him dead.

So far, 3 casualties have been rescued: a man and a woman in their 80s, and a man in his 40s.

Update: As of 12:20, a man in his 40s has been rescued without signs of life. MDA paramedics have pronounced him dead. So far, 3 casualties have been rescued: a man and a woman in their 80s, and a man in his 40s.

MDA Spokesperson: Following last night’s incident in Haifa:

After complex rescue operations, MDA paramedics pronounced the death of a man and a woman, both approximately 80 years old, and are continuing to provide medical cover for the continuation of the rescue operations.

🔴 ELIMINATED: Majid Khademi, the Head of Intelligence of the IRGC.

Khademi was one of the IRGC’s most senior commanders and had accumulated extensive experience over many years.

Khademi worked to advance terrorist attacks worldwide, and was responsible for monitoring Iranian civilians as part of the regime’s suppression of internal protests.

تعلن وزارة الدفاع القطرية عن تعرض دولة قطر، لهجوم بعدد من الطائرات المسيّرة، وعدد (2) صاروخ كروز من إيران، اليوم الأحد، ونجحت قواتنا المسلحة "بفضل من الله" بالتصدي لجميع الطائرات المسيّرة وصاروخي الكروز. حفظ الله قطر وأميرها وشعبها والمقيمين على أرضها. The Qatari Ministry of Defense announces that the State of Qatar was subjected today, Sunday, to an attack involving a number of drones and (2) cruise missiles launched from Iran. Our Armed Forces, by the grace of God, successfully intercepted all drones and both cruise missiles. May Allah protect Qatar, its Amir, its people, and all residents on its land.

The public is advised to obtain information only from official sources and to avoid circulating rumors or unverified information.

الدفاعات الجوية الإماراتية تتعامل مع الصواريخ الباليستية والجوالة والمسيرات الإيرانية. UAE Air Defences engaged Iranian Ballistic and Cruise Missiles and UAVs Attacks#وزارة_الدفاع #وزارة_الدفاع_الإماراتية#MOD#UAEMinistryOfDefence pic.

UAE Air Defenses engaged 9 Ballistic Missiles and 1 Cruise missile and 50 UAV’s.

The Ministry of Defense announced that on April 5, 2026, UAE air defense systems successfully engaged 9 Ballistic missiles and 1 Cruise missile and 50 UAV’s launched from Iran.

Since the onset of these blatant Iranian attacks, UAE air defenses have engaged a total of 507 ballistic missiles, 24 cruise missiles, and 2,191 UAV’s.

No martyrs, fatalities, or injuries have been reported in the past hours. Since the onset of the blatant Iranian attacks, the total number of martyrs has reached 2, in addition to the martyrdom of a Moroccan civilian contracted with the Armed Forces. The total number of civilian fatalities stands at 10, from Pakistani, Nepalese, Bangladeshi, Palestinian, Indian, and Egyptian nationalities.

The total number of injuries has reached 217 since the onset of the blatant Iranian attacks, involving individuals of various nationalities, including Emirati, Egyptian, Sudanese, Ethiopian, Filipino, Pakistani, Iranian, Indian, Bangladeshi, Sri Lankan, Azerbaijani, Yemeni, Ugandan, Eritrean, Lebanese, Afghan, Bahraini, Comorian, Turkish, Iraqi, Nepalese, Nigerian, Omani, Jordanian, Palestinian, Ghanaian, Indonesian, Swedish, Tunisian, Moroccan, and Russian.

The Ministry of Defence affirmed that it remains fully prepared and ready to deal with any threats and will firmly confront anything that aims to undermine the security of the country, in a manner that ensures the protection of its sovereignty, security and stability and safeguards its interests and national capabilities.

Operations at the facility have been immediately suspended while damage is assessed. No injuries have been reported. An update will be provided once further information is available.

The public is advised to obtain information only from official sources and to avoid spreading rumours or unverified information.
